name: holo-rss-reader
description: RSS/Atom feed reader and daily digest skill with Gist OPML import, full-article caching, and WeChat Official Accounts bridging.

interface.shortDescription: Read RSS feeds and generate daily digests.
interface.longDescription: A skill for managing RSS/Atom subscriptions, importing OPML from GitHub Gists, fetching new articles concurrently, generating daily digests, caching full article text, and bridging supported WeChat Official Accounts through wechat2rss.
defaultPrompt: Add this WeChat Official Account feed.
